title: Process table is filling up with <defunct> entries
description_md:
`ps aux` on this box shows a steadily growing pile of `<defunct>` (zombie) processes, all parented to the same background job dispatcher. The container's process-count limit is tight, and this is slowly eating into it -- eventually nothing will be able to fork a new process at all. SSH in as `trainee` (passwordless `sudo`), find what's spawning children it never cleans up, and stop it.

You're done when the dispatcher process is no longer running.
